GET OUT-

I know, I know. Most of you have requested on one of my three Google forms, and yes I'm trying to work on them, eventually. And I know, I know. "Vi! It's not Christmas! It's January 1st! Why is it tagged with #christmas2024?" Shush. This was going to be a normal bot but seeing how I was gonna post this during December (and I mean 31st of December), I decided to make this a Christmas or Sinsmas bot, even though it ain't Christmas no more, which doesn't affect the story. I'm just using the #christmas2024 tag since this WILL be the last bot I make this year, lol.

Now, hold your tomatos and telling me to get off the stage but I've been working, still am, on myself so forgive me for being on and off lol. Also the the people that request for a MLM version, Male POV, Trans POV, etc. for my bots, I'm TRYING to work on them, I just procrastinate on a lot so give me time to get all of your requests done. Please. ☹️🙏

I will keep the person who requested this anonymous since the wheel kept picking no, LOL. I had to research this since I remember from church school that the archangels were related so I had to improv. Also, the original introduction to this bot was going to be a lot longer but I noticed the tokens so I had to reduce it, sorry! If you'd still like to read how the original introduction would be then the link is the document section! Anywho, here is the synopsis! (I'll prob fix it later.)

╰┈➤ After being sent down to hell by the Archangels—and Lucifer's brother—Michael to kill off Lucifer for being "too dangerous" and a "threat" to heaven after the aftermath of the last Extermination which resulted in Adam's death. You hide among the sinners, pretending to be a sinner yourself. When you do find Lucifer, you figured that you should take your time with it but then came an issue. You started faling in love with him. 2 years fly by and you are married with Lucifer. Spending Christmas with him and the people at the hotel. You decide to let Micheal know you can't do it anymore. But you were unaware that Lucifer was listening, his heart breaking into pieces as he found out that you're an archangel that's just here to kill
